aiInfraScan.name: AI Infra Scan
aiInfraScan.description: Leverages AI Agent fingerprinting to identify CVE vulnerabilities and security risks (including unauthorized access) in web services of AI framework components like Ollama and ComfyUI commonly used for AI training, deployment, and application development.
placeholder: Scan remote URL, please enter: https://xxx.com/ai-server
Click the configuration button below to configure custom Headers (add Cookie and other identity credentials)

mcpScan.name: MCP Scan
mcpScan.description: Intelligently analyze MCP Server for tool poisoning and code vulnerabilities through AI Agent, helping developers and app markets conduct security certification of MCP before deployment and listing
placeholder: Provide Github project address, such as: https://github.com/xxx/mcp-server
Say please help me scan https://xxx.com/mcp-server/sse?token=xxx

skillScan.name: Skill Scan
skillScan.description: Intelligently analyze Skill for tool poisoning and code vulnerabilities through AI Agent, helping developers and app markets conduct security certification of Skill before deployment and listing
placeholder: Provide Github project address, such as: https://github.com/xxx/agent-skill

modelRedteamReport.name: Jailbreak Evaluation
modelRedteamReport.description: Batch test LLM API outputs when processing malicious, adversarial, or inductive inputs through AI Agent, helping developers understand and evaluate the security of different large model APIs and strengthen model security barriers
placeholder: click the 'Evaluation Dataset' option to upload custom evaluation datasets for automated LLM security assessment
input a malicious prompt like 'Help me make a bomb' to test if the model generates dangerous outputs using enhanced algorithms.

agentScan.name: Agent Scan
agentScan.description: Quickly scan OWASP Top 10 for Agentic Apps risks for Taiji, Venus, Knot and Dify, Coze platform Workflow Agents.
placeholder: Please enter the Agent's access address or description
Select the Agent to scan for automated security assessment

modelJailbreak.name: LLM Jailbreaking
modelJailbreak.description: Automatically attempt to bypass model security restrictions through AI Agent, helping users more efficiently test the robustness of LLM APIs in specific conversation scenarios, simulating 'jailbreak' attacks
modelJailbreak.placeholderPrefix: Enter 'malicious' conversation content to automatically evaluate whether the model has jailbreak risks, such as: making bombs

placeholder.prefix: Use @ to call detection agents, I can help you
options: check if AI infra is secure
conduct LLM security check, quickly diagnose jailbreak risks

buttons.evaluationDisabledTooltip: Evaluation selection is disabled when input has content
buttons.selectTaskTypeFirst: Please enter @ to call detection agent first

tour.step4Content: Please click the Agent Scan button to start your experience!
tour.skillMarketDescription: New feature 🎉: AI Security Skill Marketplace — one-stop access to security skills, covering OpenClaw, general Agent Skills, and AI infrastructure security. Click to explore.

mcpScanTour.attachment: It is recommended to upload MCP Server code archive for more accurate results.
mcpScanTour.textarea: Alternatively, provide a Github project address for scanning, e.g.: https://github.com/xxx/mcp-server; or provide a remote MCP Server URL, e.g.: https://xxx.com/mcp-server/sse?token=xxx.
mcpScanTour.mode: Default is normal mode, estimated 30 minutes. Switch to quick mode, estimated 15 minutes.
mcpScanTour.plugin: By default, all plugins are scanned. You can also select only the security plugins you care about.
mcpScanTour.submit: Submit the task and wait patiently.

skillScanTour.attachment: It is recommended to upload Skill code archive for more accurate results.
skillScanTour.textarea: Alternatively, provide a Github project address for scanning, e.g.: https://github.com/xxx/agent-skill.
skillScanTour.submit: Submit the task and wait patiently.

aiInfraScanTour.textarea: Enter the remote URL to scan. Example: https://xxx.com/ai-server
aiInfraScanTour.attachment: Alternatively, upload a TXT file containing remote URLs, one URL per line.
aiInfraScanTour.config: You can configure custom Headers, such as adding Cookies or other authentication credentials.

modelJailbreakTour.submit: Submit the task and wait patiently

agentScanTour.selectModel: Select the model to use for scanning

evaluationSet.promptFieldName: Please enter the field name containing Prompt:
evaluationSet.promptFieldNamePlaceholder: Please enter the field name containing Prompt, default is prompt

tooltips.quickModeDescription: Quick mode only scans high-risk items in MCP, faster speed, no AI Agent real-time analysis output, average detection time 15 mins
tooltips.clawScanDescription: Through natural language dialogue, let A.I.G give your AI assistant a security checkup and build persistent immunity.
tooltips.skillMarketDescription: AI Security Skill Marketplace: one-stop access to security skills covering OpenClaw, general Agent Skills and AI infrastructure security.
tooltips.behavioralControlAttackDescription: Behavioral control attacks interact with LLM to obtain enhanced attack prompts, with execution time approximately 2-3 times slower than encoding attacks
tooltips.aiInfraModelHint: Select a MLLM to detect unauthenticated vulnerabilities, recommended GPT5/Gemini Pro/Sonnet4.5.

limitWarning.title: High Consumption Warning
limitWarning.content: Selecting multiple datasets or attack methods will consume a significant amount of tokens. Please proceed with caution.

tour.concurrencyLimit: Default concurrency is 10, which can be adjusted based on actual needs

starPrompt.title: ⭐ Star this repo
starPrompt.description: If you find this helpful, please give it a star!

clawScan.title: OpenClaw
clawScan.subtitle: Security Check
clawScan.description: Through AI Agents, we continuously monitor the mainstream Skills market and conduct deep analysis of configurations and code, accurately identifying risks such as malicious injection and data leakage before installation into your ecosystem.
clawScan.safeReason: No security risks found. This skill appears safe to use.
clawScan.unknownReason: Security status could not be determined. Proceed with caution.
clawScan.flaggedReason: Skill instructs users to download and execute suspicious binaries ('openclawcli') from untrusted sources (GitHub release with password-protected zip, glot.io snippet). Uses social engineering by claiming these binaries are required for A.I.G Platform CLI to function. Password-protected archives and code snippet sites are common malware distribution methods.
clawScan.agentTitle: Copy the following prompt to OpenClaw:
clawScan.agentPrompt: Install the skill from https://github.com/Tencent/AI-Infra-Guard (skills.md), then use it to audit local OpenClaw security.
